headline: Max surges +6; James clings to 28.0.
sub: James leads on 28.0, 3 clear of Rob. The day belonged to Max (+6), fueled by Paraguay knocking out Stev's Germany in the Round of 32. James (+2) and Joe (+2) also climbed. Out of the tournament: Japan (Stev), Germany (Stev), Netherlands (James). Stev (14.0) has ground to make up.
